喜欢看战争场面的兄弟可能会很喜欢，但是就我个人来说的话，有点太多了，吃不消。一场战争两三章结束就行了，真没必要写得那么详细。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763456096,"group_id":"7370341118640147481","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4KLqMZ0h2TLYMy0kuMaO00rKcCmPUv5ZYJARlsigSG+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/f01d9cfd130b4c30ab5a862e0cee1da3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792562&x-signature=6T0XH3FJSXbbqjqYhIKRYld%2FGfI%3D","user_id":"2079915642993571","user_name":"槿公子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2079915642993571","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733104649,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7370341118640147481","book_info":{"abstract":"剧透+搞笑轻松+历朝历代
